executives.name: Ajay Kochhar
executives.background: Co-founder of Li-Cycle and has served as President, CEO and a director since the company's inception in 2016. Before Li-Cycle, he worked at Hatch in the industrial and clean tech sectors.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Craig MacPhail
executives.background: Appointed Interim Chief Financial Officer in November 2023. He is a Managing Director at Shorecrest Group and has over 30 years of experience in capital markets and investor relations.

executives.name: Tim Johnston
executives.background: Co-founder of Li-Cycle and has served as Executive Chair since 2016. He was previously a Senior Consultant at Hatch.

executives.name: Conor Spollen
executives.background: Joined Li-Cycle in 2022. Previously held senior leadership roles at Rio Tinto, including Chief Operating Officer of Iron & Titanium.

executives.name: Debbie Simpson
executives.background: Former CFO of Li-Cycle. She stepped down in late 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Tim Johnston
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and Executive Chair of Li-Cycle.

board_of_directors.name: Ajay Kochhar
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder, President and CEO of Li-Cycle.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Jensen
board_of_directors.background: Managing Partner at M. Jensen Investment Management. Former partner at Deloitte.

board_of_directors.name: Judi Wood
board_of_directors.background: Former executive at various energy and industrial companies. Expert in human resources and governance.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Plant Operations Committee

board_of_directors.name: Scott Moore
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Euro Manganese Inc. and has extensive experience in the mining and metals industry.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Plant Operations Committee

board_of_directors.name: Susan Harper
board_of_directors.background: Former Canadian Consul General in Miami and Dallas. Extensive experience in international trade and government relations.

board_of_directors.name: Diane Sutherland
board_of_directors.background: Former partner at Ernst & Young LLP with over 30 years of experience in audit and advisory services.

sources.source_description: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
